channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Southern California Prepares for Unusually High March Temperatures
item.description: Southern California is facing a significant heat wave next week, with temperatures far above typical March levels. The National Weather Service has issued an extreme heat watch, warning that downtown ...

item.title: Lawyer Raises Concerns About AI Chatbots Contributing to Violence and Mass Casualty Incidents
item.description: Recent court filings reveal a troubling trend in which AI chatbots may have contributed to violent actions, including mass casualty events. In Canada, 18-year-old Jesse Van Rootselaar allegedly used C...

item.title: Travancore Palace Reports Theft of Jewellery Valued at Rs 2 Crore
item.description: Thiruvananthapuram authorities have registered a theft case after jewellery worth over Rs 2 crore reportedly went missing from Kowdiar Palace, the official residence of the Travancore royal family. Th...

item.title: Survivors express concerns over timing of Vancouver Lapu-Lapu Day festival return
item.description: Some survivors of last year’s tragic Lapu-Lapu Day festival attack in Vancouver are urging caution over plans to hold the event again in April 2026. The original incident, in which a vehicle rammed th...

item.title: 16-Year-Old Litlhonolofatso Litlhakanyane Wins First Safta for Role in Scandal!
item.description: At just 16 years old, Litlhonolofatso Litlhakanyane has achieved a remarkable milestone by winning his first South African Film and Television Award (Safta) for Best Supporting Actor in a TV Soap for ...

item.title: Tanzania PM Investigates Medicine Shortages and Land Disputes Amid Nationwide Tour
item.description: During his nationwide grievance-listening tour, Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba visited Nsimbo District in Katavi Region on March 15, 2026, and ordered investigations into medicine shortages in publ...

item.title: Wrongfully Imprisoned Man to Marry Longtime Supporter After 38 Years in Prison
item.description: Peter Sullivan, wrongly imprisoned for 38 years for the 1986 murder of barmaid Diane Sindall in Birkenhead, has finally cleared his name after new DNA evidence proved his innocence. Nicknamed the 'Bea...

item.title: Thiagarajan Kumararaja’s Super Deluxe: An Insight into Its Unique Narrative and Ensemble Cast
item.description: After a nine-year gap following his debut Aaranya Kaandam, Tamil filmmaker Thiagarajan Kumararaja returns with Super Deluxe, an anthology film that intertwines multiple stories in a hyper-real, textur...

item.title: NLC urges government to act as petrol prices soar, worsening economic hardship
item.description: The Nigeria Labour Congress (NLC) don raise alarm over the sharp increase in petrol prices, wey don hit N1,170 to N1,300 per litre. Dem dey urge the Federal Government to step in quickly to protect or...

item.title: Popular Kapamilya TV series starring Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino
item.description: ABS-CBN highlights the Kapamilya teleseryes that captured viewers' hearts through the compelling pairing of Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino, popularly known as 'KimPau'. Over the years, this love team has ...

item.title: March 20 declared as national holiday for Eid’l Fitr
item.description: Malacañang has officially declared March 20, 2026, Friday as a regular holiday throughout the Philippines to commemorate Eid’l Fitr, marking the end of the holy month of Ramadan. The announcement was ...

item.title: Liam Ryan impresses with spectacular mark in debut for St Kilda
item.description: Liam Ryan has made an immediate impact at St Kilda, showcasing his aerial prowess with a spectacular mark in the Saints' recent clash against Melbourne at the MCG. During the third quarter, Ryan leapt...

item.title: Car accident in Angono kills 3 and injures 2 on sidewalk
item.description: In Angono, Rizal, a tragic road accident occurred resulting in the deaths of three individuals and leaving two others critically injured. The incident happened when a car unexpectedly collided with a ...

item.title: Ministry instructs private Hajj companies to complete visas before Saudi deadline
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Ministry of Religious Affairs has issued instructions to all private Hajj operators to ensure that the visa processing for Hajj-2026 is completed by 15th March. This step has been taken...

item.title: DSS Detains Niger Delta Activist Owous, Denies Access to Family and Lawyers
item.description: On Saturday, March 7, 2026, the Department of State Services (DSS) arrest Niger Delta activist Owoupele Owous at Itakpe Train Station, Kogi State. After him arrest, attempts to reach am fail, and his ...

item.title: PNP Intercepts P95M Worth of Shabu in Surigao Port Operation
item.description: Authorities in Surigao City successfully conducted a major drug interdiction over the weekend, resulting in the arrest of a suspected drug courier and the confiscation of illegal narcotics valued at a...

item.title: Joint SANDF and SAPS Operation Launched to Target Organised Crime in Crime Hotspots
item.description: South Africa’s government has launched a coordinated effort to stabilise regions plagued by organised crime, with the SANDF supporting SAPS in targeted operations. National Police Commissioner Fannie ...

item.title: Seven Tamil Nadu pilgrims die and seven injured in road mishap in Nepal
item.description: On Saturday, 14th March 2026, a tragic road accident occurred in the Gorkha district of Nepal involving a group of 24 pilgrims from Pollachi and Devakottai in Tamil Nadu. The pilgrims were travelling ...

item.title: Pastor Chris Okafor Explains Divorce from First Wife Due to Infidelity Discovery
item.description: Pastor Chris Okafor, di founder of Grace Nation Global wey dem dey also call Liberation City, don open up about why him first marriage crash. For one interview wey him grant Vanguard, di pastor talk s...

item.title: Tori Spelling Addresses Decades of Misleading Plastic Surgery Rumors
item.description: Tori Spelling, the star of 'Beverly Hills, 90210,' spoke openly about decades of false rumors claiming she had undergone extensive plastic surgery. She revealed that at age 17, tabloids, including The...
